mapper.sql: id, app_id, tool_id, name, description, open_api_schema, version, is_deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM tools_schema WHERE tool_id = #{toolId} AND version = #{version} AND is_deleted = 0

SELECT
FROM tools_schema WHERE
(tool_id = #{item.toolId} AND version = #{item.version})
AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE tools_schema SET is_deleted = #{isDeleted} WHERE tool_id = #{toolId} AND version = #{version}
